entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and number of different foods consumed over a specific period

entities.name: FOOD CHOICE DRIVERS
entities.description: Factors that influence the decisions of consumers when selecting food

entities.name: LOW-INCOME CONSUMERS
entities.description: Individuals with limited financial means living in urban environments

entities.name: NAIROBI
entities.description: An urban settlement in Kenya characterized by rapid urban growth

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in East Africa

entities.name: BULAWAYO
entities.description: An urban settlement in Zimbabwe characterized by moderate urban growth

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: A country in Southern Africa

entities.name: LILONGWE
entities.description: An urban settlement in Malawi characterized by slow urban growth

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A country in Southeast Africa

entities.name: MIXED METHODS DATA COLLECTION
entities.description: A research approach combining qualitative and quantitative data gathering techniques

entities.name: RAPID FOODSCAPE APPRAISAL WORKSHOPS
entities.description: A qualitative method used to collect information on food environments

entities.name: FOOD STORIES
entities.description: A qualitative method used to gather personal narratives about food environments

entities.name: STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRES
entities.description: A quantitative tool used to collect socio-demographic and dietary data

entities.name: SENSEMAKER
entities.description: A digital tool used for collecting and analyzing structured questionnaire data

entities.name: 24-H RECALL
entities.description: A dietary assessment method where respondents recall all food consumed in the previous 24 hours

entities.name: FOOD GROUP DIVERSITY SCORE
entities.description: A metric derived from 24-h recall to quantify the diversity of food groups consumed

entities.name: FOOD PRICES
entities.description: The cost of food items, which acts as a significant driver of food choice

entities.name: SANITATION AND HYGIENE
entities.description: Environmental conditions that affect the quality and safety of diets

entities.name: FOOD STANDARDS REGULATION BODIES
entities.description: Institutions responsible for overseeing food safety and quality standards

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The biological and social distinction between men and women, affecting dietary diversity

entities.name: NUTRIENT-DENSE FOODS
entities.description: Foods that provide a high amount of nutrients relative to their caloric content

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: Nutrient-dense plant-based foods

entities.name: ANIMAL-SOURCE FOODS
entities.description: Nutrient-dense foods derived from animals

entities.name: CONVENIENCE
entities.description: The ease of access or preparation of food, acting as a driver of food choice

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The capacity to maintain food systems without depleting natural resources

entities.name: FOOD POLICIES
entities.description: Guidelines and regulations aimed at improving nutrition, health, and food safety
